title: Goals, Context, Outputs, Boundaries, and Done Conditions · Guided Eval Studio
summary: Write a production-ready prompt for a high-impact code and document change. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reusable goal-context-output-boundary template while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State the desired result and audience before prescribing implementation steps.
Provide context that can change the result and route the agent to authoritative sources.
Specify output structure, granularity, evidence, and machine-readable constraints when they matter.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:

# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-done-conditions-2vgebl" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Done Conditions into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-done-conditions-2vgebl
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
